name: DataTable
description: Data table with sorting, selection, and column management. Powered by TanStack Table.

getRowId.description: Unique key extractor for each row

showCheckbox.description: Show checkbox column for row selection (requires selectable)

onRowClick.description: Handler for row clicks/keyboard activation. Called as (row, event)

getSubRows.description: Extract sub-rows for expandable tree tables

captionHidden.description: Hide caption visually but keep it for screen readers

bordered.description: Wrap table in a bordered container

wrapperClassName.description: Additional class name for the outer wrapper div

wrapperProps.description: Props forwarded to the outer wrapper div (id, aria-*, data-*, handlers)

when: Displaying structured, tabular data with sorting
Data that users need to scan, compare, and act upon
Lists with multiple attributes per item that need sorting or selection
Data-rich tables requiring column sizing and row clicks
whenNot: Small screens (consider card or list view)
guidelines: Keep columns to a reasonable number (5-7 max)
Use consistent alignment (numbers right, text left)
Use showCheckbox for bulk selection workflows

examples.name: Default
examples.description: Basic data table with status badges and role columns

examples.name: Rich Cells
examples.description: Custom cells with avatars, stacked text, and column sizing

examples.name: Sortable
examples.description: Click column headers to sort ascending or descending
examples.code:
<DataTable
  columns={transactionColumns}
  data={sampleTransactions}
  sortable
  bordered
  caption="Recent transactions"
  captionHidden
  aria-label="Transactions"
/>

examples.name: Checkbox Selection
examples.description: Select rows with header checkbox for select-all and individual row checkboxes

examples.name: Expandable Rows
examples.description: Hierarchical data with collapsible sub-rows, like a file tree

examples.name: With Filters
examples.description: Combine with search input and menu dropdowns for filtered views

examples.name: Clickable Rows
examples.description: Rows respond to click and keyboard activation
examples.code:
<DataTable
  columns={endpointColumns}
  data={sampleEndpoints}
  onRowClick={(row) => alert(`${row.method} ${row.path}`)}
  size="sm"
  aria-label="API endpoints"
/>

examples.name: Striped
examples.description: Alternating row backgrounds for dense data
examples.code:
<DataTable
  columns={endpointColumns}
  data={sampleEndpoints}
  striped
  size="sm"
  sortable
  aria-label="API endpoints"
/>

examples.name: Empty State
examples.description: Display when no data matches the current filters
examples.code:
<DataTable
  columns={basicColumns}
  data={[]}
  emptyMessage="No users match your search criteria"
  aria-label="Search results"
/>

relations.note: Use Table for simple semantic HTML tables
Use EmptyState for empty table states

propsSummary: onRowClick: (row, event) => void - row activation handler with event access
wrapperClassName / wrapperProps - style and configure the outer wrapper div
